title: LBD Shaders
description: A pretty modular OptiFine shaderpack for learning shading
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Shader-Type?label=Type&labelColor=282c2c&color=F0B132) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/OptiFine%20%2F%20Iris-Loader?label=Loader&labelColor=282c2c&color=00A8FC) ![GitHub last commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/Annhilati/lbd-shaders?logo=github&label=Latest%20Development&labelColor=282c2c&color=248046) ![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/annhilati/lbd-shaders?label=License&labelColor=282c2c) --- ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/%E2%9A%A0%EF%B8%8F%20This%20pack%20is%20currently%20only%20available%20with%20German%20translations!-F23F42) ### 📋 About LBD Shders is a shaderpack which is ideal for learning OptiFine GLSL due to its good structure. And maybe a few cool effects will be added too. --- ### ⚙️ Compatibility This pack works with OptiFine as well as Iris and has no major compatibility issues. ---
📦 Features
  • Color Sources
    • Albedo (colotex0)
    • Depth (depthtex0)
    • Shadowtex (shadowtex0)
  • Post Processing Effects
    • 1-Bit (everything reduced to 10 colors)
    • Pseudo Thermal (luminiscense to color spectrum)
  • Colorgrading
    • Grayscale
    • Sepia
    • Inverted
  • Coordinate-specific Tests
    • Drawing circle on the screen
    • Vignette
Technology used
  • #include
  • #define
  • shaders.properties
  • defining functions
  • defining lang
